the rate limiting one — that's been bothering me. can you check git blame on that line and tell me when it was added?
Checking git blame on src/gateway.zig:8923 now.
[tool_result] 7f3a2b1c (Alex 2026-03-15 14:22:18 -0400 8923) // TODO: rate limit per-user instead of per-IP

Added by you on March 15. About 6 weeks ago. Looking at the surrounding code at line 8923, it's in the request limiter middleware. Currently uses IP-based bucket; the comment notes per-user (using auth bearer userId) would be more correct since multiple users often share an IP behind NAT/VPN.
yeah that's the one. let's fix it now. it's not a big change right?
Should be ~30 lines. The bucket key changes from req.remote_ip to authResult.user_id (with IP fallback for unauthenticated paths). Want me to draft the diff?
Drafting now. Will post the patch in a moment.
